description: |

modified: 2026/05/31

detection:
    selection_email:
        EventID: 28
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - '.hta'
            - '.lnk'
            - '.iso'

            - '.docm'
    selection_network:

level: critical

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Remote Code Execution -- Actively Exploited High EPSS CVE-2022-28368
id: 6144a047-b46c-5d01-b706-d1dd7e2c3c91
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2022-28368 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-28368
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/31
modified: 2026/05/31
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2022-28368 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-31T20:16:36Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2022-28368", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2022-28368 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1078053; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-31, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] CVE / Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 6.5/10). EPSS 88.91% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism, Command and Scripting Interpreter (2 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: MODERATE (50%) - partial intelligence corroboration.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical SECURITY AFFAIRS MALWARE NEWSLETTER ROUND 99 CVE-2026-26980
id: 0e5cdb49-eea3-5c95-9036-3e6b7ca0ba9d
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-26980 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: SUPPLYCHAIN
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26980
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/31
modified: 2026/05/31
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-26980 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-31T20:16:36Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-26980", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-26980 Exploitation Attempt - SUPPLYCHAIN"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7519756; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-31, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Authenticated Arbitrary File Upload Vulnerability Patched in Slider Rev
id: bfe5c5d4-e357-5642-a8ed-b11dd40e9de1
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-6692 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6692
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/31
modified: 2026/05/31
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-6692 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-31T20:16:36Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-6692", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-6692 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2224721; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-31, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Exploitation of Remote Services, Command and Scripting Interpreter (2 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: MODERATE (44%) - partial intelligence corroboration.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Rapid7 Observed Exploitation of PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Byp
id: 56f0715f-16cf-5490-ad87-1a3d6f784567
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-0265 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: AUTHBYPASS
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0265
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/31
modified: 2026/05/31
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-0265 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-31T20:16:36Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-0265", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-0265 Exploitation Attempt - AUTHBYPASS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4989608; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-31, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
